/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -flto=auto -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/core_engine.dir/link.d  -o core_engine.cpython-314-aarch64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/core_engine.dir/src/core_engine/bindings.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core_engine.dir/src/core_engine/src/pathfinding.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core_engine.dir/src/core_engine/src/beckmann_math.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core_engine.dir/src/core_engine/src/constraints.cpp.o
